positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a majestic mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be sharply defined, rendered in deep indigo and charcoal tones, contrasted against a vibrant gradient sky of soft peaches, burnt orange, and muted cyan. Incorporate geometric, stylized floral elements and constellations subtly integrated into the mountain peaks and sky, creating a sense of celestial harmony and adventure. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. Style: Vector graphic illustration meets modern etching, clean lines, high contrast, flat design principles, cinematic lighting.
negative: photorealistic, detailed face, people, logo, text, words, dirty, messy, grain, blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, poor quality, extra limbs, low resolution, bad anatomy
